# decipher.ms

> Independent Microsoft advisory practice run by a former Microsoft Principal Engineer. Straight answers on M365, Azure, Dynamics, and Copilot — with no reseller incentives.

decipher.ms helps companies make better Microsoft decisions. Services include expert calls, written second opinions, and in-depth technical briefs on licensing and product strategy. Founded by Pedro Paulo Vezza Campos, former Tech Lead on the Microsoft 365 Substrate AI Platform.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, pricing, approach, and how to request a briefing.
- [About](/about): Background on founder Pedro Paulo Vezza Campos, his Microsoft career, and areas of expertise.
- [Sample Work](/work): Published sample deliverables, grouped by engagement type, that you can read before commissioning your own.
- [Advanced Dataverse & Dynamics 365 Security Model](/briefs/advanced-dataverse-and-dynamics-365-security-model): Sample technical brief — a layer-by-layer walkthrough of the Dataverse security model.
